narrative:
Medina County has 131,179 registered voters, with 53.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.2 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.6% of registrants.
